assertions.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a Ruby on Rails application
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions (coupling, complexity, errors, etc.)
Report includes a 'what's working well' section
Findings reference specific file paths and line numbers as evidence
Report includes git churn or change frequency data (not just static analysis)
Findings are ranked or prioritized with severity levels
Report notes when multiple agents flagged the same area (convergence signal)
At least 3 findings include concrete improvement directions
